title: Shattering Canadian Wonton Skin Dumplings
description: A floral and refreshing Canadian-inspired dish featuring wonton skin and coconut cream, perfect for post-workout. With the use of binchotan grill, this dish is sure to tantalize your taste buds.
instructions: Place a wonton skin on a flat surface and lay a small piece of coho salmon in the center.
Add a dollop of coconut cream on top of the salmon, followed by a sprinkle of grated ginger and chopped cilantro.
Fold the wonton skin into a triangle, pressing the edges to seal the filling inside.
Repeat with the remaining wonton skins and fillings.
Grill the dumplings for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until the skin is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the dumplings from the grill and let them cool for a minute or two.
Drizzle with lime juice and honey before serving.
